sections.title: Shipped
sections.body_markdown:
- Merged **PR-456**: pagination fix for list endpoint; behind flag `list_v2` (off by default).
- Released **hotfix 1.2.3** for null ref in checkout flow; monitored 24h with no regression spike.

sections.title: In progress
sections.body_markdown:
- **Auth refresh** (**ABC-90**): ~80% complete; open question on token lifetime — sync with **security Friday**.
- **Spike** on queue migration: notes in `docs/queue-spike.md`; go/no-go scheduled next week.

sections.title: Learnings
sections.body_markdown:
- Learned **Vendor X** rate limits are **per API key**, not per account — updated client wrapper tests.
- Tuesday deploy postmortem: adding a **smoke check** step before promoting canary.
